archive_policy: 阶段完成后，将已结束且不再参与当前调度的 feature 快照移入 harness/archive/，本文件只保留当前阶段和近期可调度项。

features.title: 严格 solver/verifier/data split 基座

features.title: first-pass short-success-trace LoRA SFT

features.title: GRPO frontier stage
features.behavior: 从已过关 SFT checkpoint 启动 GRPO，用 strict verifier reward 尝试超过 SFT fallback。
verification: docs/experiments/grpo_pilot_design_20260616.md records reward, train pool, monitoring, stop gates, and 90%+ threshold
eval_checkpoint.py 在 validation/test split 上复评
evidence: 2026-06-16 GRPO pilot design active: plans/active/20260616-grpo-pilot-design.md and .check.json created; docs/experiments/grpo_pilot_design_20260616.md sets 90%+ target as >=123/136 validation, reward v1 as strict correctness with small missing-answer penalty, active-difficulty train pool, monitoring metrics, and stop gates.
2026-06-16 GRPO pilot design verification: ./scripts/harness-check.sh passed with 0 warnings; python -m compileall src scripts passed.

2026-06-16 GRPO design review incorporated: docs/experiments/grpo_pilot_design_20260616.md now requires train-pool audit before long training, answer-close token metrics, wrong-answer stop monitoring, TRL compatibility probe for extra reward columns/remove_unused_columns/mask_truncated_completions, beta=0/0.001 probe instead of beta=0.02 default, and scale_rewards none/group short probe.
2026-06-16 GRPO design review verification: ./scripts/harness-check.sh passed with 0 warnings; python -m compileall src scripts passed.

2026-06-16 GRPO design consistency pass: reward text synchronized across design/progress/decisions as +1.0/-0.2/-0.1; train-pool audit gates quantified as size>=200, mixed>=25%, zero-std<=75%, correct-vs-truncation mixed>=50; early success gates quantified as >110/136, retention>=108/110, answer-contract failures<26/136, wrong-answer failures<=3/136.

2026-06-16 GRPO scaffold implementation: added src/game24_rl/rewards.py for strict verifier reward and answer-close metrics, src/game24_rl/grpo.py for prompt dry-run, pool audit gates, and compatibility metadata, scripts/train_grpo.py and scripts/build_grpo_pool.py CLI wrappers, plus focused tests tests/test_grpo_rewards.py and tests/test_grpo_pool.py. Compatibility probe now fail-fasts on missing TRL/unsupported fields and attempts to instantiate GRPOConfig before passing.

2026-06-16 GRPO scaffold verification: python -m compileall src scripts passed; pytest tests/test_grpo_rewards.py tests/test_grpo_pool.py tests/test_training_pipeline.py passed with 18 tests; ruff check src scripts tests passed; ruff format --check src scripts tests configs passed; ./scripts/harness-check.sh passed with 0 warnings; pytest passed with 47 tests.

2026-06-16 short probes: lora_r16_beta001_none_5 reached 114/136=83.82% with 108/110 retained and 6 new; lora_r16_beta001_none_10 reached 113/136=83.09% with 108/110 retained and 5 new; lora_r16_beta001_group_5 reached 108/136=79.41% with 106/110 retained and 2 new; lora_r16_beta001_lr5e7_5 reached 110/136=80.88% with 106/110 retained and 4 new. Current best is the 5-step none configuration.

2026-06-17 route search: added GRPO pool selection filters and ran focused probes. Filtered 1-2 correct plus truncation pool selected 37 train prompts and reached 114/136=83.82%, tying but not beating the prior best; filtered max_completion_length=512 reached 113/136=83.09%; targeted sampled-success full SFT refresh on 250 train success traces dropped to 95/136=69.85% with retention 87/110. Do not expand these negative branches.

2026-06-17 route search update: current best is lora_r16_beta001_filtered_g8_lr5e7_5 at 116/136=85.29%, retention 109/110, 7 new successes, 1 lost SFT success, 20 answer-contract failures, and 0 wrong-answer failures. Negative adjacent probes: same route with 10 steps fell to 114/136, beta=0.002 fell to 111/136, original 88-prompt mixed pool G8/lr5e-7 fell to 108/136. Remaining failures are long-search truncations before <answer>; next route is closure-aware reward or targeted long-search pool, not blind step/beta expansion.

2026-06-17 close-bonus probe: implemented optional --reward-profile close_bonus with default strict reward unchanged; focused tests passed locally and on AutoDL. Remote probe lora_r16_closebonus_beta001_filtered_g8_lr5e7_5 reached 115/136=84.56%, retention 108/110, 7 new, 2 lost, 21 answer-contract failures; it did not beat strict reward best 116/136, so do not expand this exact profile.

2026-06-17 second-stage GRPO probe: added --initial-adapter support and trained from best 116/136 LoRA adapter on 24 hard mixed train prompts selected from current-checkpoint audit. Training ran 5 steps with reward_std present and KL about 8e-5, but validation fell to 112/136=82.35%: retained 111/116, lost 5, gained 1, all 24 failures still answer-contract with no <answer>. Do not expand this hard-pool continuation route without a new stopping/closure objective.

2026-06-17 verifier-rerank decoding: implemented greedy-then-sampled strict-verifier rerank evaluation. Using best 116/136 greedy outputs plus G8 sampled candidates for the 20 greedy failures reached 133/136=97.79% validation with standard strict verifier report at /root/autodl-tmp/projects/grpo-short-pilot/lora_r16_beta001_filtered_g8_lr5e7_5/eval_verifier_rerank_greedy_plus_failures_g8/validation-verifier-rerank-eval-report.json. This is a decoding/search-selection result, not a greedy GRPO checkpoint improvement.
notes: GRPO 是冲击上限的核心阶段，但必须在 M2 达标后开始。
需要重点防 reward hacking、长度崩塌和早期 peak 后退化。
GRPO should start with a conservative pilot from the strong SFT checkpoint; rollout audit shows reward variance but requires strict length/truncation monitoring.

Current implementation is a safe scaffold: reward tests, train-pool audit, answer-close metrics, GRPO dry-run, and compatibility probe metadata are local; real GRPOTrainer training remains intentionally disabled until AutoDL compatibility probe passes.

Current evidence separates two routes: greedy GRPO best remains 116/136, while inference-time strict verifier rerank reaches 133/136 by exploiting sampled correct trajectories without changing verifier or split.

features.title: 消融、OOD 和课程报告材料

verification: 每个 reported score 都声明 model/split/decoding/verifier
docs/baselines.md 和实验报告表格同步更新
notes: 这不是第一阶段阻塞项；不要在 M1/M2 前抢占主线时间。

features.title: SFT 严格审计、case study 和修复复训
features.behavior: 对低准确率 SFT 进行评测代码、数据、训练代码和 baseline 差异审计；产出报告、case study、focused tests/diagnostics，修复确认的问题并启动新一轮 SFT。
verification: manual: docs/experiments/sft_audit_report.md records evaluation/data/training/baseline audit evidence
manual: outputs/diagnostics/sft_case_study/summary.json exists and is cited by the audit report
manual: repaired SFT run is started on AutoDL and checkpoint eval artifacts are recorded

2026-06-15 baseline-format v2 full finetune backup: scripts/experiments/run_rollback_sft_experiment.py used --mode train on prebuilt dataset data/processed/experiments/game24-baseline-format-v2-qwen-answer-train.jsonl (35324 records, 1011 unique train multisets, 32355 rollback records, validation overlap 0), Qwen/Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct, training_mode=full, prompt_style=qwen_chat, max_steps=400; AutoDL eval summary outputs/experiments/baseline_format_v2_full/eval/summary.json reports checkpoint-400 and final both at 51/136=37.50% solve_rate, format_rate=38.97%, valid_expr_rate=38.24%.

2026-06-16 strong full fine-tuning SFT: independent record docs/experiments/sft_full_finetune_search_trace_20260616.md; final run outputs/experiments/baseline_format_v2_full_5000_from800 continued from local checkpoint-800 to max_steps=5000 with cosine LR schedule and strict validation summary outputs/experiments/baseline_format_v2_full_5000_from800/eval/summary.json reports checkpoint-4500 and final both at 110/136=80.88% solve_rate, format_rate=80.88%, valid_expr_rate=80.88%.

2026-06-16 TensorBoard default: future experiments should use TensorBoard logging; scripts/experiments/run_rollback_sft_experiment.py defaults to --report-to tensorboard with override support, and configs/sft_v1.yaml plus configs/sft_v3_checked_chat.yaml set training.report_to=[tensorboard].

2026-06-16 strong SFT analysis: pulled local metrics/eval artifacts; sparse trajectory is checkpoint-400 51/136=37.50%, checkpoint-800 70/136=51.47%, checkpoint-4500/final 110/136=80.88%; checkpoint-4500 and final raw greedy outputs are byte-identical for all 136 validation puzzles; remaining 26 failures are all answer_contract truncations with no <answer> block; docs/experiments/sft_full_finetune_search_trace_20260616.md records curve, failure analysis, and observability limits.

2026-06-16 GRPO rollout audit: scripts/experiments/audit_rollout_distribution.py sampled the strong SFT checkpoint; docs/experiments/grpo_rollout_audit_20260616.md records validation pilot pass@4=30/32 with 16/32 mixed groups and greedy-failure targeted pass@8=22/26 with 19/26 mixed groups, showing useful GRPO reward variance but severe length/truncation risk.

2026-06-16 M2 closed: SFT audit and repair produced strong full fine-tuning result 110/136=80.88%, failure analysis, rollout audit, and archived active plan plans/archive/20260615-sft-audit-and-repair.md; current WIP moved to M3-grpo-frontier.
notes: Audit order is intentional: evaluation code first, then data samples/distribution, then training code/generation/checkpoint behavior.
Allowed to compare against LLM4Game24 as reference baseline, but do not copy its code or loosen this repo strict verifier/reporting contract.
M2 is no longer active; strong full fine-tuning SFT is the warm start for M3.
Future long SFT runs that require accuracy curves should set --save-total-limit > 1 and keep TensorBoard/raw eval artifacts.
